title: VEC-435 It Was Just Supposed To Be One Night Of Infidelity... I Went On A Date Of Betrayal With My Husband's Employee, And I Knew I Shouldn't Have Fucked Him Rei Aoki
description: The subordinate that my husband brought was Takahashi, who was the partner when Rei enjoyed a one-night flirtation. (No way, he was a subordinate of her husband ...) We must avoid revealing the secret relationship between the two to her husband. Rei welcomes Takahashi as if he had met him for the first time ... Takahashi, whose affair with Rei is unforgettable, will be relentlessly pressed. Rei, who has grasped her weaknesses, leaves herself to Takahashi after a tough decision.
